title: Readiness Assessment
description: Lightweight governance-level readiness assessment recording the readiness level, blocking items, and evidence references for a run or engine output.

run_id.description: Identifier of the run this assessment applies to.

system_id.description: Registered system identifier aligned to the ecosystem registry.

evaluated_at.description: Timestamp when this readiness assessment was produced (ISO 8601).

readiness_level.description: Readiness classification for the run or output set.

total_checks.description: Total number of evaluation checks executed.

warnings.description: Number of checks that produced warnings.

evaluation_summary.description: Aggregated pass/fail/warning counts across all checks.

blocking_items.description: Human-readable list of items blocking advancement to the next readiness level.

ref_id.description: Identifier of the referenced evidence artifact.

ref_path.description: Optional relative path to the evidence artifact.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence artifacts supporting this assessment.

notes.description: Optional freeform context about the readiness assessment.
